description: HTML source code for a web-based database visualizer interface, including styling and JavaScript for dynamic database/table browsing and data display.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches the list of databases from the server and populates the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the database list, resetting current selections.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses database entry to show tables.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Loads tables for a selected database from the server.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Fetches and displays data from the selected table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Renders the data table with fetched data, handling wide content.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Generates HTML for individual table cells, handling nulls, objects, and long strings.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content for wide or object data.
